metadata.title: AFSECMO Group | Industrial Project Support
metadata.description: AFSECMO Group supports mining, oil & gas, construction, procurement, logistics and field operations from Abidjan across West Africa.

hero.headline: Industrial Project Support for West Africa's Critical Operations
hero.subtitle: AFSECMO supports mining, oil & gas, construction, logistics and industrial operations with procurement, import-export coordination, equipment mobilisation, maintenance support and field-ready project services from Abidjan.

items.label: Strategic headquarters based in Côte d'Ivoire, serving West Africa.
Core industrial sectors: Mining, Oil & Gas, Construction, and Logistics.
End-to-end support from procurement and import-export to logistics, mobilisation, maintenance and site services.

pillars.title: Field-ready service
pillars.description: Solutions designed for real operating conditions: site constraints, urgent requests, equipment availability, logistics and safety standards.

pillars.title: Professional coordination
pillars.description: A single point of contact for sourcing, suppliers, transport, on-site teams and project follow-up.

pillars.title: Long-term relationships
pillars.description: We focus on reliable partnerships with clients, suppliers and contractors to support recurring operational needs.

services.description: AFSECMO brings together technical support, procurement, logistics, maintenance and construction coordination under one professional service platform.

cta.heading: Ready to mobilise your next operation?
cta.description: Share your requirements with AFSECMO and our team will coordinate the right procurement, logistics, equipment, technical or field-support solution for your project.

items.title: Driving operational reliability across mining and quarry sites.
items.summary: Operational support for mining and quarry sites, including equipment sourcing, spare parts, safety materials, aggregates, fleet coordination and field logistics. AFSECMO helps extraction teams reduce delays and keep production environments supplied.

items.title: Supporting oil, gas and energy infrastructure with technical procurement and site services.
items.summary: Technical procurement, equipment mobilisation and maintenance coordination for upstream, downstream, storage, energy and utility infrastructure. We support critical operations with vetted suppliers, site-ready materials and disciplined project follow-up.

items.title: Coordinating construction, civil works and industrial project support.
items.summary: Support for civil works, site preparation, industrial buildings, utilities, renovation projects and infrastructure delivery. AFSECMO coordinates materials, equipment, subcontractors and documentation to keep works moving safely and efficiently.

items.title: Moving equipment, materials and project supplies from source to site.
items.summary: End-to-end coordination for moving materials, equipment and teams from suppliers to operational sites. Our support includes transport planning, consolidation, import-export assistance, delivery tracking and site readiness.

items.title: Electrical, Plumbing & Utilities
items.summary: Technical installation and maintenance support for facilities, camps, warehouses and operational buildings.

items.title: Central Purchasing & Import-Export
items.summary: Reliable sourcing, purchasing coordination and import-export follow-up for equipment, materials and approved suppliers.

items.title: Equipment Rental & Fleet Support
items.summary: Fast mobilisation of machinery, vehicles and support assets for project sites and field operations.

items.title: Logistics & Project Mobilisation
items.summary: Transport planning, warehousing coordination and site delivery support for equipment, materials and teams.

items.title: Facility & Asset Support
items.summary: Operational support for camps, workshops, site facilities and assets that need dependable service management.

contact.titleLead: Partner with AFSECMO for reliable industrial execution.
contact.description: From procurement and logistics to equipment mobilisation, construction support and industrial maintenance, our team helps operators move faster, reduce supply-chain friction and keep critical sites operational.

contact.title: Get in touch
contact.description: Reach out to our Abidjan headquarters for a project discussion.

careers.title: Join our team
careers.description: Explore professional opportunities to make a positive difference.
